use_cases: Landing page hero sections for SaaS and software products requiring immersive visual impact
Portfolio and creative agency websites showcasing 3D design capabilities
Product marketing pages with engaging visual storytelling
Interactive landing pages for fintech applications requiring modern aesthetics
Developer tool and API documentation sites with premium visual polish
ai_summary: An ethereal 3D hero component featuring animated beam effects rendered via Three.js and React Three Fiber with custom physical shaders. The component creates a ghostly, translucent visual effect with continuous 3D animation, suitable for modern landing pages requiring immersive visual experiences. Built with TypeScript and integrates lucide-react icons for CTAs.
